---
title: "Managing Open Source Projects: Standards and Collaboration Tools" 
description: | 
  Presentation for the Multi-omics Network Analytics (MoNA)/Data Science Platform (DSP) meeting at Copenhagen, Denmark.
date: "2025-07-17"
image: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Multiomics-Analytics-Group/multiomics-analytics-group.github.io/HEAD/public/assets/(background%20removed)%20MoNA%201.png
categories:
  - 👨‍🏫Oral presentation 
  - 🌍Open Science
  - 📚Education
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} MoNA/DSP][mona]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides][slides]{.btn target=_blank} 

[mona]: https://multiomics-analytics-group.github.io/
[slides]: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.15985179
